title: ICAI CA May 2026 Exams: Late Fee Registration and Correction Window Update!
content:
# ICAI CA May 2026 Exams: Late Fee Registration and Correction Window Update!

Ek important update hai for all CA Foundation, Intermediate, and Final aspirants appearing for the May 2026 examinations. The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) ne exam application process se related key deadlines announce kiye hain.

As per the latest updates, candidates still have a chance to register for the May 2026 exams, albeit with a late fee. Also, a dedicated window for corrections in the submitted application forms will open soon.

*   **Late Fee Registration End Date:** The last date to submit your examination form with a late fee is **March 19, 2026**.
*   **Correction Window:** The facility to make corrections to your submitted May 2026 examination forms will be available from **March 20, 2026, to March 22, 2026**. During this period, candidates can rectify details such as exam center, group, or medium of examination.

Aapko salah di jaati hai ki inn dates ka dhyan rakhein aur time par apne applications complete kar lein.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Visit the ICAI Examination Portal for latest updates and application](https://eservices.icai.org/)

*Published on: 18 March 2026*
